series_metadata.series_description: These letters are sent to taxpayers in order to obtain and provide certain information. They are broken down into three categories. A. PI-1 through 38: These consecutively numbered letters are used to verify certain taxpayer information. A reply is expected and one copy is filed in office files. B. PG-1 through 14: These consecutively numbered letters seek information concerning split and unprocessable checks. A reply is expected and one copy is filed in office files. C. TPS 1 through 22: These consecutively numbered letters provide general information to taxpayer questions. No reply is expected but a copy is retained.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: copy in office files two years from December 31 of year received and
